types.name: RealtimeTranslationClientSecretCreateRequest

fields.name: expires_after
fields.description:
Configuration for the client secret expiration. Expiration refers to the time after which
a client secret will no longer be valid for creating sessions. The session itself may
continue after that time once started. A secret can be used to create multiple sessions
until it expires.

types.description: Create a translation session and client secret for the Realtime API.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationClientSecretCreateRequestExpiresAfter

fields.name: anchor
fields.description: The anchor point for the client secret expiration, meaning that `seconds` will be added to the `created_at` time of the client secret to produce an expiration timestamp. Only `created_at` is currently supported.

fields.name: seconds
fields.description: The number of seconds from the anchor point to the expiration. Select a value between `10` and `7200` (2 hours). This default to 600 seconds (10 minutes) if not specified.

types.description:
Configuration for the client secret expiration. Expiration refers to the time after which
a client secret will no longer be valid for creating sessions. The session itself may
continue after that time once started. A secret can be used to create multiple sessions
until it expires.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationSessionCreateRequest

fields.name: model
fields.description: The Realtime translation model used for this session.

fields.name: audio
fields.description: Configuration for translation input and output audio.

types.description:
Realtime translation session configuration. Translation sessions stream source
audio in and translated audio plus transcript deltas out continuously.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationSessionCreateRequestAudio
types.description: Configuration for translation input and output audio.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationSessionCreateRequestAudioInputTranscription

fields.name: model
fields.description: The transcription model to use for source transcript deltas.

types.description:
Optional source-language transcription. When configured, the server emits
`session.input_transcript.delta` events. Translation itself still runs from
the input audio stream.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationSessionCreateRequestAudioInputNoiseReduction
types.description: Optional input noise reduction. Set to `null` to disable it.

types.name: NoiseReductionType
types.description: Type of noise reduction. `near_field` is for close-talking microphones such as headphones, `far_field` is for far-field microphones such as laptop or conference room microphones.

fields.name: language
fields.description: Target language for translated output audio and transcript deltas.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationClientSecretCreateResponse

fields.name: expires_at
fields.description: Expiration timestamp for the client secret, in seconds since epoch.

types.description: Response from creating a translation session and client secret for the Realtime API.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationSession

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the session that looks like `sess_1234567890abcdef`.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The session type. Always `translation` for Realtime translation sessions.

fields.name: expires_at
fields.description: Expiration timestamp for the session, in seconds since epoch.

fields.name: model
fields.description:
The Realtime translation model used for this session. This field is set at
session creation and cannot be changed with `session.update`.

fields.name: audio
fields.description: Configuration for translation input and output audio.

types.description:
A Realtime translation session. Translation sessions continuously translate input
audio into the configured output language.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationSessionAudio
types.description: Configuration for translation input and output audio.

types.name: RealtimeTranslationSessionAudioInputTranscription

fields.name: model
fields.description: The transcription model used for source transcript deltas.

types.description:
Optional source-language transcription. When configured, the server emits
`session.input_transcript.delta` events. Translation itself still runs from
the input audio stream.

methods.description:
Create a Realtime translation client secret with an associated translation session configuration.

Client secrets are short-lived tokens that can be passed to a client app,
such as a web frontend or mobile client, which grants access to the Realtime
Translation API without leaking your main API key. You can configure a custom
TTL for each client secret.

Returns the created client secret and the effective translation session object.
The client secret is a string that looks like `ek_1234`.

requestBody.description: Create a client secret with the given translation session configuration.
